title.en: Ye Tianyi fought with his opponent and was dire...

content.en:
The opponent of the fifth level of the Taichu Tower was very powerful, stronger than Ye Tian had imagined.

Ye Tianyi fought with his opponent and was directly suppressed.

In terms of true strength, Ye Tian is not as good as the opponent of the fifth level of the Taichu Tower, but he does not limit the means in the Taichu Tower, so Ye Tian can use any means, he only needs to defeat the opponent.

Thereupon.

Ye Tian took out his Will Blade Knife and urged the five Ten Thousand Phases Statues.

Rumble!!!!!!

The power of the five Ten Thousand Phases statues gathered on Ye Tian's body, although the increase was not large, it could still increase the strength by three percent.

Of course, only he can urge five Ten Thousand Phases Statues at once, and other Eternal Masters can urge up to two or nine Ten Thousand Phases Statues to obtain a kind of inheritance secret ability of the Ten Thousand Phases Lin Dragon.

And in the battle, even if it is the Snow Maiden master, she does not dare to urge the five Ten Thousand Phases Statues, otherwise the body of control will not be able to withstand it, then it will not improve the strength, but suppress the strength.

However, Ye Tian had devoured the Ten Thousand Phases Lin Dragon, and had the physique of the Ten Thousand Phases Lin Dragon, so he could accommodate five Ten Thousand Phase Statues, and could increase his strength by three percent at the level of the Nine Realms level controllers.

And the Willblade can also improve his strength.

Coupled with the fact that Ye Tian himself had also devoured the Devouring Mountain, he could absorb the attack of the opponent in the fifth level, ensuring that he would not be damaged too much.

Under the combined factors, Ye Tian's strength is terrifying.

War!!!

Ye Tian held the Will Blade Knife and fought frantically with the opponent of the fifth level of the Taichu Tower, completely ignoring the opponent's attack.

Gradually, Ye Tian suppressed his opponent.

Moreover, the Will Blade is the Transformation Realm Will Transformation, and its power is very terrifying, and with the Space-Time Rift Blade, it can burst out with even more terrifying attacks, causing the opponent's controlled body to be constantly injured and gradually collapse.

In the end, Ye Tian killed the other party.

"I won, but the opponent who won the fifth level was very difficult, my own strength did not reach this level, it was only by relying on the Will Blade Knife, the five Ten Thousand Phases Statues, and my own physique that I forcibly smashed the opponent's primordial golden light and the body of control, and then I killed the opponent!" Ye Tian muttered.

He didn't try to get through the sixth level, so he couldn't pass it at all, and the sixth level was much more difficult than the fifth.

Even if he has a special physique, he can't withstand the attack power of the opponent in the sixth level, and can only save his life, but if he resists countless years, he will eventually be consumed to death, so it's not necessary.

After passing the fifth level, Ye Tian came out, and his name appeared directly on the list of those who passed the fifth level.

Of course, no one paid attention to him at the moment.

After all, there are very few Eternal Controllers who break into the Primal Tower, and it is impossible for there to be Eternal Controllers who look at this list all the time.

However, it won't be long before Ye Tian's strength will be exposed.

......

"Sure enough, I got a lot of rewards!"

Ye Tian took the reward given to him by the Primal Pagoda Instrument Spirit and came out of the Primal Pagoda.

Many of these rewards can improve the volitional realm, although the increase is not too large, but at least it is valuable, and this is a free reward, get it for nothing!

So, it's nice to have such a reward!

Ye Tian didn't expect the Taichu Tower to give an amazing reward all at once, that was unrealistic!

Besides, he only passed the fifth level, not the ninth level.

On Taichu Mountain, in addition to the Taichu Tower, there is also a place for rewards, that is, Taichu Lingshan, Taichu Lingshan will give birth to Taichu Lingquan liquid every once in a while, and once it appears, it will be snatched by many eternal masters.

The use of the primordial spiritual spring liquid is to alleviate the erosion and assimilation of the origin of the origin realm sea to the body.

For example, an eternal master who has taken the path of self-creation can use the origin of the Origin Realm Sea to refine his body, and his strength will become stronger and stronger, and eventually reach the ultimate of the Nine Realms level controller.

However, it is not without a price!

Using the origin of the Origin Realm Sea to refine the body, the body will gradually be assimilated by the Origin Sea, and will be bound by the Origin Realm Sea in the future.

There are no drawbacks at the moment, but there is a speculation about the existence of those who have transcended the Ten Realms, that is, once the body is assimilated by the Origin Realm, there will never be any hope of transcending the Origin Realm Sea.

The current limit of the Origin Realm Sea is the Ten Realms Level, like the Ten Elements Ancestor and the Primordial Ancestors, they have all broken the Ten Realms and surpassed the Ten Realms Level, but they have not reached another completely new realm.

If you want to reach the level of the Ten Elements Ancestors, your body must not be assimilated to ten percent by the Origin, in fact, it is dangerous to reach more than seven percent.

And the Primal Spiritual Spring Liquid can slow down the assimilation of the body's origin, and its value is naturally very high, and it is difficult for the outside world to find it, but the Primal Ancestor left a lot of Primal Spiritual Spring Liquid in the Primal Mountain, and released some every once in a while for people to snatch it.

Basically, the eternal masters who snatched the Primal Spiritual Spring Liquid were all Ten Realm-level masters who could pass the sixth or even seventh level of the Primal Tower.

This kind of good thing is also needed by the Ten Realm-level masters.

Therefore, Ye Tian's current strength is not qualified to participate at all, it is almost occupied by the Ten Realm-level controllers, and it belongs to the encirclement of their circle.

In addition to these, there is also a treasure in Taichu Mountain, that is, the Taichu Source Tree!

The Primordial Source Tree is an incomparably valuable tree found by the Primordial Ancestor from the end of the realm, which can make people participate in the changes of the Enlightenment Dao, and the effect is better than that of the Ten Thousand Phases Statue.

Eternal Controllers who do not have a statue of all phases, if they obtain the Primordial Token, will go to the Primordial Source Tree to participate in the changes of the Enlightenment Path.

"Let's go check it out!"

Ye Tian leaped step by step, and soon came to the Primordial Source Tree.

At this time, there are still quite a few eternal masters of enlightenment and cultivation here, and there are about hundreds of them, and they all occupy relatively good positions.

Ye Tian casually chose a location and began to practice here.

This replica body of his is here to practice, and he can also comprehend the statue of ten thousand phases, without wasting time.

Time passed slowly, and Ye Tian continued to comprehend the cultivators.

After a long time, Ye Tian finally perfected his Endless Dao.

Next, he just needs to keep mastering the changes of the Endless Dao.

Time flies.

On this day, there was a news from the Origin Realm Sea that the Snow Maiden Controller, a disciple of the Ten Elements Ancestor, was going to open up the ninety-ninth Boundary River and impact the Ten Realm-level Masters realm.

"Senior sister is going to open up the boundary river, then let's go and have a look!"

Ye Tian left Taichu Mountain and went to a boundary area where the Snow Maiden's controller wanted to open up the Boundary River.
